metadata.convention: WT baseline = standard K-12 host (MG1655 or W3110 or comparable) harbouring the standard crtEBI cassette at chromosomally integrated or plasmid-based wild-type expression, cultured in LB at 30 C with inducer on. 'increased' = lycopene titer higher than this baseline. 'decreased' = lower. 'unchanged' = within measurement noise of baseline. Fold-changes quoted in evidence are reported as published.

evidence.title: Advances in Discovery and Engineering of Gene Targets for Carotenoid Biosynthesis
evidence.authors: Su B, Deng MR, Zhu H
evidence.evidence_sentence: overexpression of dxs in E. coli carotenoid production was enhanced 3.5-fold
evidence.claim: Dxs OE increases lycopene ~3.5x

evidence.title: Advances in Discovery and Engineering of Gene Targets for Carotenoid Biosynthesis

evidence.title: Fine-tuning the downstream MVA pathway of Escherichia coli by systematic RBS engineering
evidence.authors: Cheng T, Wang L, Sun C, Xie C
evidence.evidence_sentence: Lycopene accumulation increased correspondingly as the promoter of the midstream module changed from pT7 to pTrc with decreasing strength
evidence.claim: Over-strong T7-driven midstream expression lowers titer vs medium-strength Trc; contradicts monotonic 'more OE = more titer'

perturbations.reconciliation_note: MVA midstream T7-strong OE; known framework limitation (plasmid burden not modelled, so prediction will not capture the decreased outcome)

evidence.title: Metabolic Engineering E. coli for the Production of Lycopene
evidence.authors: Wang Z, Sun J, Yang Q, Yang J
evidence.evidence_sentence: Deletion of ppc removes the anaplerotic OAA branch; in lycopene production backgrounds this commonly decreases growth rate and lycopene titer
evidence.claim: Ppc single KO typically decreases lycopene in aerobic batch due to loss of anaplerosis
